name: Intercom Messaging
description: Conversations, contacts, tickets, articles via Intercom's official MCP

env_vars.how_to_set: app.intercom.com → Settings → Integrations → Developer Hub → New App → Authentication

tools.name: list_conversations
tools.description: List Intercom conversations with optional filters for state, assignee, or date range

state.description: Filter by conversation state: open, closed, snoozed, or all

assignee_id.description: Filter conversations assigned to a specific team member ID

tools.name: reply_to_conversation
tools.description: Send a reply message to an Intercom conversation from a team member or bot

conversation_id.description: The Intercom conversation ID to reply to

message_type.description: Message type: comment or note (internal note only visible to team)

admin_id.description: ID of the admin/team member sending the reply

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new Intercom contact (user or lead) with email, name, and custom attributes

custom_attributes.description: Key-value map of custom contact attributes

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search Intercom contacts using query operators on email, name, or custom attributes

query.description: Intercom search query object with field, operator, and value

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Retrieve a single Intercom contact by ID with all attributes, tags, and conversation history

contact_id.description: The Intercom contact ID to retrieve
